sourceScope.primarySourceFile: NY Regulations/2021 VLM Report_DRAFT-(1-27-2020) with academy Updates V1-Reg-143-11-NYCRR-S041.pdf
sourceScope.sourceTitle: Accelerated Payment of the Death Benefit Under a Life Insurance Policy
sourceScope.sourceStatusNote: Current through March 15, 2020; the page-image wording backstop remains required because the text layer is noisy / OCR-like.

observedSectionWindows.note: Title page, purpose, definitions, accelerated death benefit provisions, and severability.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single Regulation 143 PDF.
Do not widen into AG files, practice notes, or other NY regulation files in the same wave.
Keep the purpose / definitions / accelerated-death-benefit / severability language review-only until a human confirms the indexing decision.
Keep the page-image wording backstop visible because the text layer is noisy / OCR-like.
Keep the batch source-bound and review-only.
exclusions: No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other guideline files in the same wave.

topicMap.label: Purpose, definitions, accelerated death benefit provisions, and severability
topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep this slice within pages 1-27 and do not absorb other NY regulation files.

proposedBatches.title: Regulation 143 purpose, definitions, accelerated death benefit provisions, and severability

pageTarget.notes: Capture the full 27-page regulation as a single review-only slice and stop at the page 27 boundary.

proposedBatches.rationale: Capture the full 27-page regulation as a single review-only slice and stop at the page 27 boundary.

reviewStandards.regulatoryRequirement: Treat the purpose, definitions, accelerated-death-benefit, and severability language as regulatory text when it directs what the company must do.
reviewStandards.definitionOrTerminology: Treat accelerated death benefit, benefit levels, benefit eligibility, and related references as terminology when the text explains rather than directs.
reviewStandards.crossReferenceMapping: Treat references to Insurance Law and Federal tax qualification concepts as cross-reference context unless operationalized.
reviewStandards.backgroundContent: Treat the title page and section labels as background unless they impose a requirement.
reviewStandards.boundaryControlWindow: Treat the 27-page slice as a review-only window that should not be merged forward.
reviewStandards.requiresHumanInterpretation: Treat the indexing choice and the noisy OCR-like text layer as requiring human actuarial interpretation unless the text is explicit.
reviewStandards.sourceQualityCaveat: Treat text-layer noise or encoding issues as review-only caveats and do not widen the batch because of them.

appReady: export is sanitized, stable, and versioned

notes: Controlled Regulation 143 planning artifact. Planned batch 272 remains review-only by default and is not an extraction run.
